tetrahedron.description: Binary tetrahedral group (24 elements) ↔ affine E₆ McKay diagram

cube.description: Binary octahedral group (48 elements) ↔ affine E₇ McKay diagram

octahedron.description: Binary octahedral group (48 elements) ↔ affine E₇ McKay diagram (dual solid: cube)

dodecahedron.description: Binary icosahedral group (120 elements) ↔ affine E₈ McKay diagram

icosahedron.description: Binary icosahedral group (120 elements) ↔ affine E₈ McKay diagram; its unit quaternions form a 600-cell
